mapper.select: select m.*, mr.role_name from member m left outer join member_role mr on ( m.mem_id = mr.mem_id ) where m.mem_id = #{memId}
select m.mem_id, mem_name , mem_pass , mr.role_name , mem_mail, mem_add1, mem_add2, mem_zip, mem_hp from member m left outer join member_role mr on ( m.mem_id = mr.mem_id )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEM_NAME = #{memName}, MEM_BIR = #{memBir}, MEM_ZIP = #{memZip}, MEM_ADD1 = #{memAdd1}, MEM_ADD2 = #{memAdd2}, MEM_HOMETEL = #{memHometel}, MEM_COMTEL = #{memComtel}, MEM_HP = #{memHp}, MEM_MAIL = #{memMail}, MEM_JOB = #{memJob}, MEM_LIKE = #{memLike}, MEM_MEMORIAL = #{memMemorial}, MEM_MEMORIALDAY = #{memMemorialday} WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId}
